Name: UCustomInstancedStaticMeshComponent
Description: A custom component that efficiently renders multiple instances of the same StaticMesh.

Variables.Name: PerInstanceSMCustomData
Variables.Description:
Array of custom data for instances. This will contains NumCustomDataFloatsInstanceCount entries. The entries are represented sequantially, in instance order. Can be read in a material and manipulated through Blueprints.
	 	Example: If NumCustomDataFloats is 1, then each entry will belong to an instance. Custom data 0 will belong to Instance 0. Custom data 1 will belong to Instance 1 etc.
	 	Example: If NumCustomDataFloats is 2, then each pair of sequential entries belong to an instance. Custom data 0 and 1 will belong to Instance 0. Custom data 2 and 3 will belong to Instance 2 etc.

Variables.Name: InstancingRandomSeed
Variables.Description:
Value used to seed the random number stream that generates random numbers for each of this mesh's instances.
		this is set to zero (default), it will be populated automatically by the editor.

Variables.Name: InstanceStartCullDistance
Variables.Description: Distance from camera at which each instance begins to fade out.

Variables.Name: InstanceEndCullDistance
Variables.Description: Distance from camera at which each instance completely fades out.

Variables.Name: InstanceNearCullDistance
Variables.Description: Distance from camera at which each instance.

Variables.Name: InstanceReorderTable
Variables.Description: Mapping from PerInstanceSMData order to instance render buffer order. If empty, the PerInstanceSMData order is used.

Variables.Name: UseDynamicInstanceBuffer
Variables.Description: Set to true to permit updating the vertex buffer used in the instance buffer without recreating it completely. This should be used if you plan on dynamically changing the instances at run-time.

Variables.Name: KeepInstanceBufferCPUAccess
Variables.Description: Set to true to keep instance buffer accessible by the CPU, otherwise it's discarded and considered never changing, only GPU has a copy of the data.

Variables.Name: PhysicsSerializer
Variables.Description: Serialization of all the InstanceBodies. Helps speed up physics creation time.

Variables.Name: NumPendingLightmaps
Variables.Description: Number of pending lightmaps still to be calculated (Apply()'d).

Functions.Name: AddInstance
Functions.Description: Add an instance to this component. Transform is given in local space of this component.

Functions.Name: AddInstanceWorldSpace
Functions.Description: Add an instance to this component. Transform is given in world space.

Functions.Name: SetCustomDataValue
Functions.Description: Update custom data for specific instance

Functions.Name: GetInstanceTransform
Functions.Description: Get the transform for the instance specified. Instance is returned in local space of this component unless bWorldSpace is set.  Returns True on success.

Functions.Name: UpdateInstanceTransform
Functions.Description: Update the transform for the instance specified.

Params.Name: InstanceIndex
Params.Description: The index of the instance to update

Params.Name: bWorldSpace
Params.Description: If true, the new transform interpreted as a World Space transform, otherwise it is interpreted as Local Space

Params.Name: bMarkRenderStateDirty
Params.Description: If true, the change should be visible immediately. If you are updating many instances you should only set this to true for the last instance.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether or not the instance's physics should be moved normally, or teleported (moved instantly, ignoring velocity).

Functions.Name: RemoveInstance
Functions.Description: Remove the instance specified. Returns True on success. Note that this will leave the array in order, but may shrink it.

Functions.Name: ClearInstances
Functions.Description: Clear all instances being rendered by this component.

Functions.Name: GetInstanceCount
Functions.Description: Get the number of instances in this component.

Functions.Name: SetCullDistances
Functions.Description: Sets the fading start and culling end distances for this component.

Functions.Name: SetNearCullDistance
Functions.Description: Sets the cull near distance for this component.

Functions.Name: GetInstancesOverlappingSphere
Functions.Description: Returns the instances with instance bounds overlapping the specified sphere. The return value is an array of instance indices.

Functions.Name: GetInstancesOverlappingBox
Functions.Description: Returns the instances with instance bounds overlapping the specified box. The return value is an array of instance indices.

Functions.Name: HideInstance
Functions.Description: Update the transform for the instance specified.
